Call ID: EXT-010
Type: external
Date: 2026-03-05
Topic: Quarterly Business Review
Participants: Tomás (account manager); Priya (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Tomás): Hi Priya, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Priya): We want to align on goals and success metrics for next quarter.
AM (Tomás): I've prepared a scorecard of your key metrics and wins.
Customer (Priya): The team is generally positive, but there are gaps.
AM (Tomás): Let's set two or three concrete goals we can track together.
Customer (Priya): This is exactly the partnership we were hoping for. Excited to expand.
AM (Tomás): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
